name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient compliance processes cause regulatory penalties. We automate OSHA compliance summaries instead of manual compliance documentation and filing.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating and filing OSHA compliance summaries efficiently.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating and filing OSHA compliance summaries efficiently.
